2k26 • Folio of Mason

Though born in Hong Kong, I spent most of my early years in the countryside in England and later graduated from BSc Product Design at Loughborough University. Fast forward 6 years, I find myself settling in London, enabling businesses like Liverpool FC, BP and NHS, in serving their customers with insight-led, immersive, digital experiences.

Outside of my day job, you'll find me training for my next open water swim race, or most likely scrolling on Collecting Cars, looking for my dream Porsche - 1981 911SC.

[01]

[01]

Experiential Craftsmanship

Experiential Craftsmanship

Driven by the belief that design has the power to shape how we live, think, and feel, my goal has always been to elevate everyday interactions into something more meaningful and crucially, quietly threading in moments of joy that catch us by surprise and stay with us for years to come.

Driven by the belief that design has the power to shape how we live, think, and feel, my goal has always been to elevate everyday interactions into something more meaningful and crucially, quietly threading in moments of joy that catch us by surprise and stay with us for years to come.

[02]

[02]

Thoughtful INNOVATION

Thoughtful INNOVATION

Thoughtful

INNOVATION

Design to me is also a bridge between emotion and function, an act of translating the invisible into the tangible. So each experience I create is rooted in deep listening and shaped by intention. It brings me great joy and motivation when I can create unique products that resonate with the end users.

Design to me is also a bridge between emotion and function, an act of translating the invisible into the tangible. So each experience I create is rooted in deep listening and shaped by intention. It brings me great joy and motivation when I can create unique products that resonate with the end users.

andSkills

Bridging emotion and clarity, my design practice generally evolves around storytelling, research and enterprise design thinking.

The aim is always the same for all projects, which is to create one of a kind, human-centred experiences that leave a positive impact.

EXpertise

and

Skills

Bridging emotion and clarity, my design practice generally evolves around storytelling, research and enterprise design thinking.

The aim is always the same for all projects, which is to create one of a kind, human-centred experiences that leave a positive impact.

[My work revolves around 3 primary objectives]

[My 3 primary objectives]

[01]

[01]

EMPATHY ENABLEMENT

EMPATHY ENABLEMENT

EMPATHY

ENABLEMENT

To help businesses foster empathy for their users and grasp their needs through the implementation of Enterprise Design Thinking. Ensuring our solutions are rooted in real human insights.

To help businesses foster empathy for their users and grasp their needs through the implementation of Enterprise Design Thinking. Ensuring our solutions are rooted in real human insights.

[02]

[02]

Strategic Synergy

Strategic Synergy

Strategic

Synergy

To bring strategic alignment by connecting business goals with what our users truly need. Creating solutions that are valuable, relevant and meaningful for both organisations and their users.

To bring strategic alignment by connecting business goals with what our users truly need. Creating solutions that are valuable, relevant and meaningful for both organisations and their users.

[03]

[03]

Experience Design

Experience Design

Experience

Design

To create meaningful and emotionally resonant experiences driven by user-insights, delivering impactful products led by best-in-class user experiences.

To create meaningful and emotionally resonant experiences driven by user-insights, delivering impactful products led by best-in-class user experiences.
